programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A Plot with a View
programme.desc: Nikki 'plots' to spend eternity with Oglevee.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack!
programme.desc: When Kim returns, Nikki’s roomie refuses to move out.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: The Accidental Therapist
programme.desc: Nikki forces the Professor into couples’ therapy.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Danni tries to help Preston after his life is threatened. Fatima is ready to pursue a relationship. Karen enacts revenge upon Zac. (S2, ep15)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Zac finds himself in legal trouble. Sabrina considers going on a date with a new guy. Gary puts it all on the line when he expresses his love for Andi. (S2, ep16)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Zac believes he is being framed. Preston invites a guest to Danni's house without informing her. Andi takes a chance and goes against the wise counsel of her dear friends. (S2, ep17)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Karen becomes very upset with Andi. Fatima threatens an attorney at the firm. Maurice walks into his home and makes a shocking discovery. (S2, ep18)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Gary comes to Andi's rescue after she gets herself into a compromising situation. Zac talks seriously to a new woman who values him in a way no woman ever has. (S2, ep19)

programme.title: The Game: The Third Legacy
programme.desc: Malik meets his half-sister and worries that he may have slept with her before they knew they were related; Tasha meets her former husband's wife and is shocked to see that the woman is surprisingly similar to herself.

programme.title: The Game: Put A Ring On It
programme.desc: Kelly is forced to come to terms with Jason's new girlfriend Camille. Meanwhile, Tasha and Kelly are planning an engagement party for Mel and Derwin.

programme.title: The Game: The Fall Of The Roman
programme.desc: While shopping with Tasha, Mel finds her perfect wedding dress. Meanwhile, Jason's relationship evolves to the next level, and he wants Camille to meet his daughter.

programme.title: The Game: I Want It All And I Want It Now
programme.desc: Melanie decides she wants to get married to Derwin before Janay's baby is born; Kelly and Jason share an emotional moment; Tasha finally admits to setting Jason up with Camille.
programme.sub-title: I Want It All And I Want It Now

programme.title: The Game: The Wedding Episode
programme.desc: The third season concludes with Melanie trying to marry Derwin before Janay gives birth to Derwin's baby, even if it requires sacrificing her dream wedding.

programme.title: The Game: Parachutes...
programme.desc: Melanie and Derwin expereience trouble in paradise when Melanie takes it upon herself to swab DJ, only to find out the baby isn't Derwin's.

programme.title: The Game: ...Beach Chairs
programme.desc: Melanie deals with the backlash of having told Derwin the results of the DNA test, only to learn that the results are incorrect.

programme.title: The Game: The Confession Episode
programme.desc: Melanie musters the courage to reveal the mistaken DNA test results of Baby DJ, further driving a wedge in her marriage and sending Janay on the warpath.

programme.title: The Game: The Wing King
programme.desc: Malik continues his downward sprial of behavior, culminating in a drunken rage and assault against a police officer. He is arrested.

programme.title: Run's House: Downward Facing Dawg
programme.desc: Seeking relief from the stress of his life, Run seeks the advice of his brother, Russell. Run decides to shadow his brother and give yoga a try in hopes that peace will find him.

programme.title: Run's House: Anger Management
programme.desc: Mom and Dad express concern over Russy's temper and decide to get professional help.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Booming
programme.desc: When Angela decides that she needs a new dog as a fashion accessory Rev puts his foot down.

programme.title: Run's House: Victoria Anne Simmons
programme.desc: Season three picks up with a very pregnant Justine and an anxious family awaiting the birth of their new child and sibling.

programme.title: Run's House: Hangin' with Run
programme.desc: Rev Run notices that Jojo isn't spending much time at home, instead, opting to hang out with his friends away from home.

programme.title: Run's House: Weight a Minute
programme.desc: Angela feels fat and actually thinks she needs to lose fifteen to twenty pounds. Vanessa thinks she's nuts for thinking she needs to lose that much weight and tells Mom and Dad.

programme.title: Run's House: Sneaker Pimps & Mini Moguls
programme.desc: Russy tells Run he wants to make more money by selling the toys he no longer uses.

programme.title: Run's House: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: Vanessa and Angela are in desperate need of money to decorate their apartment.

programme.title: Run's House: Home Alone
programme.desc: With the release of Justine's children's book fast approaching, Run suggests a quiet, peaceful weekend away, to help her prepare for an upcoming book reading.

programme.title: Run's House: Run's Birthday
programme.desc: Run's birthday is coming up and he's conflicted about how to celebrate.

programme.title: Run's House: Family Album
programme.desc: Justine gets the performance bug and suggests laying down an R&B track in the studio.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Sweet Smell Of Success Episode
programme.desc: To boost her spirits from her failing acting career, Big Dee Dee decides to throw a big Legends Ball. Mona begins to worry that her new relationship with Chase is only based on the physical.
programme.sub-title: The Big Sweet Smell Of Success Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Turning Over A New Leaf Episode
programme.desc: While throwing a baby shower for her ex-boyfriend and his new wife, Dee Dee notices that everyone is paired up except for her, and begins to struggle with her nonexistent personal life.
programme.sub-title: The Big Turning Over A New Leaf Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Diva Down Episode
programme.desc: Mona & Spencer become at odds over giving their newest act the 'star treatment' during a music video shoot. Meanwhile, Dee Dee is asked to appear on a popular sports program that wants to feature female sports agents.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big My Funny Valentine Episode
programme.desc: Mona becomes worried when her new boyfriend, Chase, seems to have no special plans for their first Valentine's Day together. Dee tries to cheer up Brett when she discovers he broke up with his ex-fiancé a year ago on Valentine’s Day.
programme.sub-title: The Big My Funny Valentine Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Take Me As I Am Episode
programme.desc: After finding out that her rival, Naomi Dawson is giving Spencer the cold shoulder, Mona immediately confronts her, and Naomi reveals to Spencer that she is HIV positive.
programme.sub-title: The Big Take Me As I Am Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Reality Bites Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee's new actor boyfriend tells her he's going to star in a new reality dating show and asks her to join in the fun. Things become difficult when Dee Dee realizes she must compete for his attention.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Stuck In The Middle Episode
programme.desc: Mona convinces Chase to hire Lorenzo as a pastry chef at City Sonoma. Chase becomes furious with Mona for not informing him that Lorenzo is her ex-boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: The Big Stuck In The Middle Episode

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Saltmarshe Hall Part 2
programme.desc: Saltmarshe Hall is a mysterious, haunted house of complete contrasts. Beneath the property lies a network of corridors and cellar rooms and the abandoned North Wing has sat empty for over 70 years,

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ye Olde Kings Head
programme.desc: The Great British pub may be on the decline but in some paranormal activity seems to be on the rise and the Ye Olde Kings Head is one of the most haunted.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: A well-known venue for accomplished as well as up and coming bands The Tivoli Venue boasts many a ghost. In this episode one of the team gets a warning from the other side that reduces them to tears and something seems to be stalking the team.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Tatton Hall
programme.desc: Something about Tatton Old Hall keeps bringing the Most Haunted team back. Something happens that stops two of the team entering, a poltergeist causes confusion and the team get a clear voice from beyond the veil.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 of this terrifying place concentrates above ground. The team are alarmed at the results from a new piece of equipment and Yvette meets her match.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100’s of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT1
programme.desc: 30 East Drive is said to house the most violent poltergeist in the world. The team go head first into what becomes their toughest challenge yet. As soon as they enter the property something is waiting and wants to be known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT2
programme.desc: The team continue their most threatening investigation yet and for some they will be scared for life mentally and physically. The most violent poltergeist in the world is ready for a fight...but who wins?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Thackray Museum
programme.desc: The medical museum houses a great many objects from its distant hospital and workhouse past with a complete Victorian street scene on the lower level.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Armley Mills
programme.desc: Once the centre of industry Armley Mills is now a museum that is said to house the phantoms of many a lost soul. From children who were caught in the machinery to a bad tempered floorwalker who doesn’t like people in his mill.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Carr House
programme.desc: Part of a once splendorous manor and a history that goes back as far as Robin Hood, Carr House is the sight of many a paranormal occurrence.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT1
programme.desc: What was once a private home before becoming a sanctuary for the elderly, the abandoned Hill House is now an eerie shadow of its former glory, that houses empty rooms, strange noises and a plethora of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT2
programme.desc: Part one saw the team seemingly getting stalked by something, and in this part it shows its hand.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Help Wanted: Angel
programme.desc: An elderly scriptwriter needs someone to bankroll his movie. Meanwhile, Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Dust Child
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help an Amerasian girl facing racial prejudice when she goes to live with her father's family in the United States.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hotel Of Dreams
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Song For Christmas
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Plane Death
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: One Winged Angels
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to fan the flames of love between a woman and her ex-husband's best friend. But his efforts backfire when he falls for the woman himself.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Going Home, Going Home
programme.desc: Mark is in a state between life and death when he's critically injured in a car accident. Jonathan takes Mark back to childhood to give him a second chance to tell his grandfather how much he loves him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: As Difficult as ABC
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Child of God
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father. She is a single mother who wants her family to take the child.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Match Made in Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Banker and The Bum
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Brightest Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Investment In Caring
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Right Thing
programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 1
programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 1
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny needs an assistant but fails to see that she's right under his nose; Sarah finds out that she needs her mum.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Leopard's Den expands and DuPlessis becomes a grandfather after a close-call with an angry elephant.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Sarah let their past catch up with them, and Caroline and DuPlessis go shopping for lion-prey.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: A white lion brings mixed fortunes to the family and Rosie is asked the big question. Amy Kriel is the last person you expect in Africa.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: Caroline's sister Judith tries to help and the drought forces Danny to sell some of his animals. Will Rosie and Max get married?

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: The drought finally throws up a fire and the wedding turns into a firefight for everyone. The omens are bad.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes and the Trevanians have to decide what future lies ahead of them in these difficult times.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: It's a year since we left Leopard's Den and much has changed. The animal hospital has been rebuilt and is now up and running. It's a big day for all the family as Danny has been fighting for custody of Evan and today they will learn the judge's decision.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny and Evan's life on the run doesn't start well when Danny falls asleep at the wheel and drives into a ditch. They have to enlist a local farmer, Johann, to winch them out.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Danny is asked by the State Vet to help control an outbreak of rabies in the National Park. When Vanessa is concerned for the animals at Mara, Danny assures her it's a long way away and advises her to continue with business as usual.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: It's the day before Rosie's wedding. Danny is proud of his daughter and determined to feed her up now that she's eating for two. All the family are excited about the imminent return of Caroline, especially Du Plessis who can't wait to see his fiancé.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are called out by a farmer who's trapped an African Wild Dog. As they're even more endangered than cheetahs and much more vicious, Danny and Alice are amazed to see one up close.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: When Du Plessis instructs the family to be around for dinner, they are intrigued to hear he's planning a big announcement. However, he won't be drawn on details and tells them to be patient.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are delighted when the Animal Hospital is given responsibility for the rescue and conservation of animals in the region – it's a big achievement after all their hard work.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are concerned about a missing male giraffe but Du Plessis is confident he can find him. He's as good as his word but they're upset to discover Mara lions have killed the giraffe.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family frantically dig for Charlotte in the rubble, hoping that somehow she has survived. Rowan arrives and takes charge of the situation, directing them to be more methodical in their rescue efforts.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are enjoying being together but agree to keep their relationship under wraps for the moment. However, they're unaware Georgina has heard their every word!

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: Danny and Alice's project to re-habilitate a group of circus elephants has been a huge success but now they have too many elephants on Leopard's Den, so they urgently need to move the circus herd to the National Park.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is helping to build a new school in the township but when Danny hurts his back he begins to have a crisis about his age. Danny and Alice are surprised when Vanessa comes to them for advice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: When a pretty, young pilot is found in bed, bound and with a bullet in her head, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if this was a random assault or payback for something that happened in the skies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Red Highway
programme.desc: The elderly owners of a local grocery are attacked and left for dead. Working with a vague witness description, Lt. Joe Kenda leads a state-wide manhunt to catch a pair of cold-blooded killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder in a Bottle
programme.desc: Eric Houston is found stabbed to death in a seedy motel, but the ensuing investigation is stymied by a long list of suspects. Lt. Joe Kenda deploys a groundbreaking new technology to catch the killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Married To The Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Highlights from various Dog Whisperer stories that impart Cesar Millan’s advice for every stage of a dog’s lifespan. We follow old and new cases that show the process of adopting the right dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Peanut & Chico, Leroy Brown, and Tucker
programme.desc: Fighting Chihuahuas learn to get along. A dog with extreme attachment issues learns to relax. A couple’s border collie Tucker is obsessed with moving water, to a point that’s become dangerous.
programme.sub-title: Peanut & Chico, Leroy Brown, and Tucker

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shadow Dogs
programme.desc: Search and rescue dogs are more play than work and must get their mission back on track. A couple expecting a baby needs help with curbing their misunderstood rescue’s biting.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Woof and Wheels
programme.desc: People and their dogs descended on a local PETCO to meet producers in the hopes of a session with Cesar Millan. Meet two of the problem pooches. Can Cesar dial down the bad behavior of these terrors?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bam Bam
programme.desc: Cesar is called in to help a Pit Bull outgrow his puppy ways. A Chihuahua Mix terrorizes an older Mastiff and dominates the rest of the house. Cesar is called in to restore the balance of power.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bear & Angel and Lorelei
programme.desc: Two German Shepherds develop an aggressive relationship when they begin going to day care. Then a miniature Schnauzer begins to bark and nip at her owner’s grandchildren.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole
programme.desc: Cesar goes to jail to help wayward humans rehabilitate wayward pups through a program called "Pups on Parole."; Bulldogs learn to play fair.
programme.sub-title: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Optimus & Gigi and Sissy
programme.desc: Cesar lends his hand reforming Great Dane Optimus, who has a biting attitude, and Sissy, a fearful Shepherd mix rescued from a terrible hoarding situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Gus, Abbey, and Vinnie
programme.desc: Tonight Show sidekick Ed McMahon’s dog is aggressive. A beagle won't leave the house. An Australian shepherd is so territorial of his owner's house that no one has visited in two years.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cotton, Ricky, and Lila & Duke
programme.desc: An American Eskimo watchdog who takes his role too far; a Shibu Inu with a mean streak; a boxer who was attached by another dog one day in the park, and has since become more aggressive.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Nuna & Kane
programme.desc: NuNu the Chihuahua, fiercely attacks anyone who comes near his owner Tina. NuNu’s total opposite, Kane the Great Dane, is vehemently afraid of shiny surfaces

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Astronaut Dogs & Mongo
programme.desc: Mongo, a pit mix has severe and potentially life-threatening separation anxiety. NASA Astronauts with problem dogs. Cesar blasts off to help knock these canine problems out of orbit.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Dasher, Riley, and Fosse
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound bites the hand that touches his toys; a 125-pound mastiff expands his grudge against the mailman; and a Yorkie has a shocking dislike of home appliances. Can Cesar help?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Ellie & J.J. and Oscar
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, star of Expedition Wild, and wife, actress Missi Pyle, seek help with their dog’s aggression toward other dogs. A rescued stray needs help conquering his fear of children.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bikini, Fella, Winston and Oliver
programme.desc: Bull terrier won't behave at home and has irrational fear of grooming; Jack Russell / Italian Greyhound mix cries and barks whenever left alone; a police officer's Yorkies are disturbing the peace.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homeboys and Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.

programme.desc: On a Los Angeles beach, a team of lifeguards led by Lieutenant Mitch Buchannon saves lives, deals with personal tragedies, fights crime, and participates in extraordinary adventures every day.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tells of when an exterminator and his cat are sent to the Doctor’s home.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: When Jon is set-up for humiliation by a dating game TV show, Garfield comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tells Odie about the stage team of Jackie and his cat Buddy.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: After falling asleep while playing a board game, Jon dreams he and Garfield are in it.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: While playing hide and seek, Odie gets found by a rich girl who wants a puppy.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Penelope falls for a hipper cat until Garfield learns to rock and roll.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: To impress a girl, Jon takes her to see a dangerous game show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Penelope imagine what it would be like to be married.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Nermal wishes upon a star that Garfield could switch places with him.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: In Frontier America, Jonny Ragweedseed and his cat make sure that ragweed will cover the land.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Ichabod Cricket shows up to be Garfield’s conscience, and everything backfires.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield goes to the Lamaar School of Cats. Roy Rooster learns the art of doublespeak.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield wins the hand of a Princess for Jon. Wade decides to shell himself up.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Heather keeps leading Jon on, while only wanting Garfield for herself.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Penelope is back singing why she loves Garfield. Aloyisius Pig is back trying to cut the budget of the show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Myron the Mouse tries to goad Garfield into chasing him. Edward R. Furrow is back psychoanalyzing the weasel and Orson.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield sits on Jon’s book and refuses to get up. Garfield thwarts a bank robbery.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s niece has to be retrieved by Garfield and Odie. Garfield gets confidence from a motivational speaker.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Irwin the Mouse wants to be cast and Garfield lets him be one. Wade visits the Sage on a mountain to see how to overcome his fears.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: The ancestor of one of the most hungry pirates sets sail. Philo is back to help give motivational speeches to the weasel and Wade.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Jon try to help out a sultan. Orson’s imagination takes Wade and Roy on an out-of-this-world experience.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s new next-door neighbor is a cat hater and Garfield has to find out why. All of the farmyards are caught in a repeating cycle of zany bits.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie go sailing on Jon’s new boat and a shark shows up. Michael can’t scare anyone until he enters the farmyard.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon gets to meet Vivacia, the TV horror show hostess of his dreams. Wade Duck is caught in a 60-minute style interview.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.
