programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Devil's Laughter
programme.desc: Convicted killer John Marriott is seemingly becoming the hardest man to execute.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Return of Mitchell Campion
programme.desc: A man visiting a small Mediterranean island is stunned when all of the island's residents recognize him and insist that he is an island resident who has returned after many years, even though he knows he has never been there before.

programme.title: The Cars That Ate Paris
programme.desc: The small town of Paris, Australia deliberately causes car accidents, then sells/salvages all valuables from the wrecks as a means of economy. Starring: Terry Camilleri, John Meillon, Kevin Miles

programme.title: The Gate
programme.desc: The removal of an old tree in Glen's backyard reveals a large and mysterious hole which leads to The Gate – an underground chamber of terrifying demonic evil.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again. Starring: Donald Pleasence, Jamie Lee Curtis, Tony Moran

programme.title: Dog Soldiers
programme.desc: A routine military exercise turns into a nightmare in the Scotland wilderness.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Navigator
programme.desc: The crew of a nineteenth century sailing ship find that somebody has altered its course before catching a stowaway, a mute, soaking wet Oriental whom they clap in irons.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Secret
programme.desc: A young woman is left alone and unloved by her domineering and arrogant husband.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Aerialist
programme.desc: An argument between two trapeze artists results in an accident in which one is paralyzed.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Burning Girl
programme.desc: Alice Deering is a shy teenage girl who is trying to fit into a new community, make new friends and coexist with her abusive aunt and insensitive father, who insists she's a pyromaniac despite her pleas of innocence.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Haunted U-Boat
programme.desc: During World War II a German U-boat is apparently haunted by a loud banging which only occurs when it is submerged.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Image of Death
programme.desc: An inspector is suspicious about the death of the wife of a Marquis, who, in fact, did kill her with his lover Charlotte as his accomplice.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Captain's Guest
programme.desc: A sadistic sea captain from the 19th century haunts a New England home and poisons the lives of a married couple after taking possession of the husband's mind.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Echo
programme.desc: Paul Martin is acquitted by a jury of the murder of his wife, although most people believe he did in fact kill her. To escape questioning reporters, he takes a house in the country.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Front Runner
programme.desc: Two jockeys who are good friends have a falling out when one accuses the other of foul practice during a race. Some years later, the accused jockey believes his accuser has obtained his revenge by supernatural means.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Riddle
programme.desc: On a trip through India, a married couple encounters a beggar who seems to be different from all the others they've seen--the husband is convinced that this particular beggar is trying to kill them.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Delusion
programme.desc: A man with a rare blood type is unwilling to donate his blood in order to save a girl's life, knowing that if he does he will be tormented by supernatural visions of her future.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Ordeal on Locust Street
programme.desc: A seemingly normal family is hiding a terrible secret: their son has the features of a deformed, fish-like monster.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Brainwave
programme.desc: Aboard a United States ship in Japanese waters during World War II, Captain Fielding is critically injured.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Doomsday
programme.desc: A poor, pretty, village woman living in Scotland in the 17th Century is sentenced to be burned at the stake, for the natural death of her lover, the son of an Earl

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Night of the Kill
programme.desc: After being missing from home young Davey Morris tells his parents he was with a friendly Bigfoot type creature. Nobody believes him until they see giant footprints and evidence that the animal has been eating their food.

programme.desc: Hilarious complications unfold when Louie starts dating the mercurial Emily after vowing never to see her again.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie learns that his old girlfriend, Zena, is getting married, he boycotts the wedding and decides to barge in on her honeymoon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tries to polish the diamond-in-the-rough, Louie, into a real gem—while Louie decides to change his image by moving into a fancy apartment building.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex starts driving all the other cabbies crazy when he discovers his beloved family pet only has a short time to live.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine becomes a nervous wreck when her young son decides to give up the oboe and take up boxing under the tutelage of Tony.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Jim's old girlfriend shows up hoping to rekindle their romance, Alex quickly sets out to win her heart away from her former suitor.
programme.sub-title: Alex Gets Burned By An Old Flame

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help another Angel who has lost her faith find her way back to heaven.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a young singer in danger of losing her vocal chords find her true voice.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels try to help fulfill a dying inventor's dream of finishing his invention which uses water instead of coal as a source of energy.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must intercede when a troubled teen goes on trial for violent behavior as a result of his obsession with a video game.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels reunite with an old friend on the eve of her wedding to an agnostic man and try to stop her from making a mistake she will regret.
programme.sub-title: At The End Of The Aisle

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angel Monica is excited at being promoted to the job of caseworker, a notch up from search and rescue missions, which finally gives her the chance to be seen by humans.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica takes a job as an assistant to a bitter high school baseball coach to help him come to terms with his impending death
programme.sub-title: Show Me The Way To Go Home

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is assigned to work with a woman who is considering suicide because a blackmailer threatens to reveal her past

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A pregnant teen must decide what to do.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An accident occurs involving two women, Megan and Susana, who are dating the same man. The angels create a house on a deserted road, where the two friends, and Susana's husband, have Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help with a social event for a well-known doctor, his wife, and his mother. A young child shows up at their home, claiming to be the child they agreed to sponsor. The wife welcomes the child, but the doctor and his mother are worried.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess take jobs as party coordinators in order to help an orphaned boy and a wealthy family discover what's been missing in all of their lives

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica’s own faith is tested when she is assigned to live on the street to help a man who’s lost his wife, his home, and his self-esteem in a special one-hour episode

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica assumes the role of a freelance reporter to help a father realize the pressure he's putting on his son
programme.sub-title: There But For The Grace Of God

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess encounter racial violence, a neighbor who turns away from any involvement, and an angel with higher power that theirs, when they volunteer to help at an AIDS hospice

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica steps in when a caustic female radio show host uses personal information about her daughter’s social life to boost her on-air ratings

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica reveals her true identity to convince a skeptical magazine editor, Callie Martin (guest star Dinah Manoff), that angels really exist

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica goes to work as a television producer to help a driven young reporter after she leaves the scene of a hit-and-run accident

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica puts on a police uniform to save a cop whose drug habit will soon destroy him

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat’s sister Heather drops by for a surprise visit at the worst possible time, just as Gabe suspends Cat and Tess from the squad in an effort to force Vincent out of hiding.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent take Agent Knox's offer to extricate and try to lead normal lives - but forces out of their control conspire to expose them and drag them back into the fray.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Twenty years ago, a man's fiance was stolen by vampires and transformed into one. Obsessed, he hunts vampires until the modern day.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Desmond is obsessed with the role that his actress-wife played 50 years ago. He finds a cursed reel that lets him bring the Lili character to life, by pushing an innocent female victim into the film.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A lonely, somewhat twisted mortician stumble upon the cursed properties of an antique embalmers' aspirator.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A famous author of real-life biographies of serial killers, famed for his insights, owes his success to an antique pen.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Micki, Johnny, and Jack are taking a break, and stargazing in Jack's old hometown. However, a ghostly biker gang, the Midnight Riders, rolls into town.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Healer/Children's Zoo/Kentucky Rye
programme.desc: Jackie steals a healing stone but loses his way/A girl's zoo visit transforms her parents' relationship/Bob enters a strange bar post-accident.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Little Boy Lost/Wish Bank/Nightcrawlers
programme.desc: Photographer faces dilemma & encounters familiar boy/Janice gets lamp with wish restrictions/Trooper's diner stop unveils vet's nightmares.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Ye Gods
programme.desc: Cupid arrives in the modern world. A love spell for his target does not work as well as he hopes.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: If She Dies
programme.desc: A year after his wife died a man is involved in a car accident that leaves his young daughter in a coma. On his way home the man has a vision.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Examination Day/A Message From Charity
programme.desc: In the far future, twelve-year-old Dickie must take the government intelligence test/A 16-year old in 1985 finds himself in telepathic contact with a girl in 1700. Her knowledge of the future gets her accused of being a witch.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Nothing like a good ghost story  except a centurys worth of films filled with more ghost stories!

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: According to local monks, the Famed Jade Empress is hidden in the valley that will be flooded when the Three Rivers Dam's flood gates have their grand opening.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia discovers that she was Cleopatra's servant in a past life when she experiences déjà vu while watching a catalog from an Ancient Egyptian relics exposition.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Matlock: Santa Claus
programme.desc: Santa Claus is set up for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Author
programme.desc: An author becomes a target for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Rat Pack
programme.desc: A starlet is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Nurse
programme.desc: A nurse is accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Convict
programme.desc: An inmate kills another inmate in self-defense.

programme.title: Matlock: The Court-Martial (Part 1)
programme.desc: A serviceman is accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Court-Martial (Part 2)
programme.desc: There is some scandal and blackmail in the military.

programme.title: Matlock: The Therapist
programme.desc: A movie star is accused of murdering another movie star.

programme.title: Matlock: The People vs. Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is accused of bribing a witness.

programme.title: Matlock: The Photographer
programme.desc: A crooked photographer is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Widow
programme.desc: A newlywed is charged with murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Doctors
programme.desc: Doctors find themselves accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Billionaire (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man is in jail.

programme.title: Matlock: The Billionaire (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than enough suspects to go around for a murder which has the wrong man in jail.

programme.title: Matlock: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock: Annihilator
programme.desc: Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.title: Matlock: Network
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock: Best Friend
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock: Christmas Show
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The contestants shoot a mock commercial for Alcatel, where they pretend to talk to their lover over the phone with a script written in French.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants meet TV presenter Laura Whitmore for a posing challenge in Carnaby Street under the pouring rain while passersby vote on their favorite contestants.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: The remaining contestants take on a catwalk challenge for TRESemmé, walking on a plexiglass runway covered in water. Lisa is chosen as the best performer, winning a year’s worth of TRESemmé products and hair services at the Daniel Galvin salon.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: The contestants meet journalist Gordon Smart and participate in a press challenge where they write a 60-second skit regarding their opinions of the other contestants, which they later present in front of the camera.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: Letitia, Lisa, and Roxanne receive a second set of makeovers. The contestants meet with Elle at Hyde Park, where they learn that the remaining five contestants will be traveling to Canada for the remainder of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The remaining five contestants fly to Toronto, where they take on the CN Tower's EdgeWalk before moving into their home at the SoHo Metropolitan Hotel.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 12
programme.desc: Star of The Hills and America's Next Top Model judge Kelly Cutrone gives the contenders a grilling in Toronto ahead of next week's final.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 13
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges join the three finalists on a Toronto beach for a tribal-themed shoot. The remaining two then take part in a fashion show where one of the girls is crowned the winner.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1

programme.desc: The remaining 17 contestants meet with the judges for one-on-one interviews and are scheduled to have a photo shoot with camels in the desert, but it gets canceled due to a sandstorm.
